title: Sign in with phone number and OTP
description: Verifies that a user can request a login code from the phone login flow, complete OTP verification, and reach the authenticated area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the login form to request a login code
Navigate to /otp-verify
Fill in the OTP field with a valid OTP
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify the authenticated area is displayed
Verify access to the protected experience is granted

title: Complete scheme fulfillment after customer OTP confirmation
description: Verifies that staff can initiate scheme fulfillment, trigger customer OTP verification, and complete fulfillment only after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with a valid staff phone number
Submit the login form to request a login code
Navigate to /otp-verify
Fill in the OTP field with a valid OTP
Submit the OTP verification form
Click the link to open the staff dashboard
Request scheme fulfillment
Trigger customer OTP verification
Complete the fulfillment after customer confirmation
Verify the scheme fulfillment is completed
Verify the completion is shown only after OTP confirmation

title: Sign in with PIN or biometric access
description: Verifies that an enrolled user can access the authenticated area through the PIN or biometric login flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /pin-login
Use the enrolled PIN or biometric access method
Verify the authenticated area is displayed
Verify access to the protected experience is granted

title: Reject incorrect OTP
description: Verifies that submitting an incorrect OTP shows access denied feedback and does not grant entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /otp-verify
Fill in the OTP field with an incorrect OTP
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify an OTP validation error is visible
Verify access to the authenticated area is denied

title: Reject invalid phone number format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid phone number on the login page shows validation feedback and prevents continuation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with an invalid phone number format
Submit the login form to request a login code
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
Verify the login flow does not continue
